frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic training box setup visible with wire patterns and coiled objects, no instruments present yet

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth following of wire contour, good instrument control

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent pace and precision following wire guide

frame_analyses.description: Scissors completing final section of wire pattern

confidence_rationale: Video appears to show wire chaser exercise rather than FLS Task 2 pattern cutting. No suspended gauze with circular pattern visible. Unable to assess pattern cutting accuracy or measure deviations from marked line. Task identification uncertain.
cannot_determine: Whether this is actually FLS Task 2 - appears to be wire chaser exercise
Deviation measurements from circular pattern - no circular pattern visible
Gauze suspension status - no gauze visible
technique_summary: Smooth instrument control following wire patterns, but this appears to be a wire chaser training exercise rather than FLS Task 2 pattern cutting which requires cutting a circular pattern from suspended gauze.
improvement_suggestions: Confirm task setup matches FLS Task 2 requirements
Practice with suspended gauze and marked circular pattern
